author: Netflix Anime
text:
Can Coco pass her first test? #WitchHatAtelier
Coco undertakes her first test as a witch. Faced with the daunting heights of the Dadah Range, will Coco reach her goal?

Witch Hat Atelier is now playing exclusively in select regions of Asia on Netflix!
https://www.netflix.com/title/82741721

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/33okaL0

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

Can Coco pass her first test? #WitchHatAtelier
https://www.youtube.com/@netflixanime

In a world where magic is a birthright, Coco discovers another way to be a witch — one that puts her at the center of a battle that can reshape society.
